description: Sync graph and relational data from your Neo4j database to any Fivetran-supported destination. Supports incremental syncs using timestamp-based cursors.

fields.name: neo4j_uri
fields.label: Neo4j Connection URI
fields.description: The Bolt or HTTP URI for your Neo4j instance (e.g. bolt://localhost:7687 or neo4j+s://xxxxx.databases.neo4j.io)

fields.name: database
fields.label: Database Name
fields.description: The Neo4j database to sync data from. Defaults to the home database if not specified.
